skills.name: discover-tools
skills.description: Progressive-disclosure workflow for finding relevant tools in APIbase's 502-tool catalog without loading every schema into the agent context.

skills.name: x402-payment
skills.description: How to pay for APIbase tools using x402 (USDC on Base) or MPP (USDC.e on Tempo). Covers the 402 challenge, payment construction, and the Payment-Required retry.

skills.name: auto-register
skills.description: How APIbase auto-registers new agents on first contact — no signup form, no human in the loop. Credentials are issued at request time and returned in the response.
